title: Iran’s Strategy: Expand the War, Increase the Cost, Outlast Trump
summary_full: The Islamic Republic is aiming to draw out the conflict and broaden the fighting. That would force President Trump to risk more casualties and more political capital.
summary_public: The Islamic Republic is aiming to draw out the conflict and broaden the fighting. That would force President Trump to risk more casualties and more political capital.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran’s Strategy: Expand the War, Increase the Cost
